translation_notes: This is an exit-only rule for long positions. The signal triggers when price (close) returns to or above a moving average level (SMA). Used sma_50 as a reasonable default since the exact SMA period was marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]. The rule exits 100% of the long position and resets to neutral. Entry conditions are contextual (long must already be open) rather than entry signals, so entry_long is empty. Target regimes mapped from TRENDING and RANGING.
